Layout.ogImageAlt: Story Events — catering and event staffing

LandingPage.metaTitle: Story Events — Exceptional staff for your receptions
LandingPage.metaDescription: Story Events provides qualified teams — maîtres d’hôtel, servers — for caterers: weddings, ceremonies, conferences. B2B partnership, discretion, and service excellence.

HeroSection.taglineExtension: maîtres d’hôtel teams and bespoke service for your events, with no compromise on your brand’s image.

LandingOffer.title: Your service subcontractor, at your brand’s level
LandingOffer.intro: When you sign a wedding, ceremony, or conference, front-of-house service carries your reputation. Story Events builds trained teams — maîtres d’hôtel, servers — who extend your catering standards, with discretion and impeccable presentation.
LandingOffer.cardExpertiseBody: Each Story Events team member embodies elegant service and precise execution, delivering impeccable performances where high standards and perfection are the norm.
LandingOffer.cardMaitreHotelTitle: Our maîtres d’hôtel at your service
LandingOffer.cardMaitreHotelBody: With Story Events, there is no need to recruit or train. Our experienced professionals master every detail, ensuring a smooth, elegant, and flawless service. Rely on teams already prepared to elevate your event without compromising on excellence.

LandingServices.title: Available profiles
LandingServices.intro: We assemble the right teams for your event formats, with constant attention to presentation, service flow, and protection of your brand image.
LandingServices.itemMaitreHotelDescription: Service coordination, attention to detail, and consistent execution at the highest standard throughout the event.

LandingRoles.title: Roles & positions
LandingRoles.itemHostsDesc: service coordination, guest welcome, protocol compliance.
LandingRoles.itemServersDesc: setup, plated or French-style service, bar support if needed.
LandingRoles.itemReinforcementsDesc: peak periods, large formats, multi-site events.

LandingInternational.title: AN INTERNATIONAL PRESENCE
LandingInternational.content: Requested across Europe, we are the choice of demanding organizers looking for exceptional service recognized internationally.
LandingInternational.imageAlt: Map illustrating Story Events' international presence across Europe

LandingFaq.title: FAQ
LandingFaq.intro: A few quick answers to the most common questions before trusting us with your next event.
LandingFaq.item1Question: Do you only work on high-end events?
LandingFaq.item1Answer: We support weddings, private receptions, and corporate events with the same level of standards. Our priority is always service quality and flawless representation of your brand image.
LandingFaq.item2Question: Can you assemble a team quickly?
LandingFaq.item2Answer: Yes, depending on availability and the format of your event. We do everything possible to mobilize the right profiles quickly, without compromising the quality of the service.
LandingFaq.item3Question: Do you provide a single point of contact on event day?
LandingFaq.item3Answer: Yes. A lead profile is designated to coordinate service execution and maintain consistent communication with your operational teams.
LandingFaq.item4Question: Can your teams adapt to our service protocol?
LandingFaq.item4Answer: Absolutely. We align with your standards, sequencing, and brand requirements to deliver a service that feels like a natural extension of your house.
LandingFaq.moreQuestions: Need details about your event format or requirements?

LandingContact.title: Discuss a partnership
LandingContact.intro: Tell us about your usual formats and requirements: we’ll get back to you with a staffing proposal and a clear framework for your upcoming events.
